concerns.text: Task T009 (Unit test for inertia tensor) depends on 'T012 interface definition', but T012 is listed AFTER T009 in the task list. Tests must be written after the interface is defined (or at least the interface task must precede the test task in the execution order to avoid circular dependency in the plan).

Task T020 (Implement shape binning logic) is marked [P] (parallel-safe) but depends on the output of T013/T014 (shape metrics derivation and filtering) from Phase 3. Bin thresholds (c/a) cannot be implemented until the metrics are computed. This violates the 'Producer before Consumer' rule.

Task T030 (Sensitivity analysis) is marked [P] but explicitly depends on T026 (statistical results output) and the binning logic from Phase 4. It cannot run in parallel with Phase 4 tasks. The [P] tag is incorrect.

Task T036 (Spin vector calculation) is marked [P] but depends on the halo shape data (T017) and potentially galaxy property data (T025) to compute misalignment angles. It cannot be parallelized with the data ingestion or statistical analysis phases.

Task T015 (Chunked loop logic) and T016 (Per-chunk calculation) are listed as separate tasks but T016 explicitly calls T012 and T013. The ordering implies T015 must complete before T016, but T015 is the orchestration logic that *calls* T016. These should be merged or T016 should be a sub-task of T015 to avoid artificial serialization.
